message:
test(fcp-core): pin OAuthRecipe serde tag matrix across JSON + CBOR

Adds the pinning test asked for by bead flywheel_connectors-v45ap
("OauthFlowKind serde tag matrix"). The bead's "OauthFlowKind" name
maps to the public OAuthRecipe enum in fcp-core; this test pins the
serde tag for each of its three variants:

- AuthorizationCodePkce → "authorization_code_pkce" (with
  authorization_url, token_url, scopes, auto_browser, callback_port
  payload fields)
- DeviceCode → "device_code" (with device_authorization_url,
  token_url, scopes, poll_interval_seconds)
- ClientCredentials → "client_credentials" (with token_url, scopes)

The test asserts exact JSON form per variant and the same payload
round-trips losslessly through CBOR. Locks the on-the-wire flow
discriminator so renaming a variant or restructuring its payload
becomes a hard test failure rather than a silent compatibility break
for any registered OAuth-using connector.

No production code changes — pure pinning test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
